---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What can't you express today?

## Proposal

What would you like to see? A new primitive, a new selector, a new
template, a behavior change — anything goes. Sketch the API if you can.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds exist today? Are they good enough?

## Scope

Is this engine-level, template-level, adapter-level, or tooling? If
you're not sure, that's fine — the maintainers will help triage.
